title: CorruptionComplaint
description: A complaint / tip reporting fraud, waste, corruption, or misconduct to the NYC Department of Investigation — DOI's single most important inbound transaction. NET-NEW: there is NO public API. Today the 'Submit Report Online' path is a third-party vendor intake form on Kaseware (app.kaseware.us/public/#NYCDOI/...), with phone, fax, and mail as fallbacks. This schema serves both the read surface (look up a complaint the reporter filed) and the write surface (file a complaint).

complaintId.description: Server-assigned complaint / case-intake number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Intake/triage status. Set by DOI, not the reporter.

subjectAgency.description: City agency, vendor, or entity the allegation concerns.

subjects.description: Individuals or entities alleged to be involved.

description.description: Free-text narrative of what happened, when, where, and who was involved.

location.description: Where the alleged conduct took place.

occurredDate.description: Approximate date the conduct occurred or was observed.

isCityEmployee.description: Whether the reporter is a City employee (Executive Order 16 reporting obligation).

whistleblowerProtectionRequested.description: Reporter invokes protection under the City's Whistleblower Law against retaliation.

anonymous.description: File without providing identifying contact details.
